{{Quote|You used to be a great bounty hunter, Stroth, back when you first found me—but you lost your nerve when you lost that arm!|Mika|<ref name="Star Wars: Republic: Show of Force">''[[Star Wars: Republic: Show of Force]]''</ref>}}
'''Stroth''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]. He was the leader of [[Crimson Nova]] for a long time before turning it over to [[Mika (Farghul)|Mika]].

==Biography==
[[File:Stroth.jpg|thumb|left|Stroth with Mika]]

Although Stroth lost his [[Limb/Legends|right arm]] in a run-in with a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], he held no ill will against them; rather he had a great respect for the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

In the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Stroth watched as [[Mika (Farghul)|Mika]] accepted [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] on Jedi. Stroth cautioned against it, but Mika didn't listen. Stroth stunned Mika and turned her over to the Jedi so that she would not [[Death/Legends|die]] battling them. Stroth became the leader of [[Crimson Nova]] once again, and agreed to terminate his contract for accepting bounties against Jedi.

==Behind the scenes==
Stroth appears to be identical to the character [[Zez-Kai Ell]] from the game ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', down to the same earrings.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 65|''Republic'' 65]]
*[[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]] {{1st}}
